description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9.0 Docker image. Include a global before_script that checks for ssh-agent and installs openssh-client if missing, then runs npm install. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a lint job that runs npm run lint, and a test job that runs npm run test. In the deploy stage add a deploy:dev job that runs bash deploy/deploy.sh and is limited to the master branch via only. No caches or artifacts are defined.
